texts.desc:
You can only use this card name's ① and ② effects once per turn each.
①：If your opponent activates a monster effect on the field, or when their monster declares an attack, and "Umi" or a card that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" other than "Fisherman, Legend of the Sea" is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
②：If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it, also return this card on the field to the hand during the End Phase of this turn.
texts.name: Fisherman, Legend of the Sea
